names.name: Xingren Caizhai GJX6+WC -- near Tianheng Gong

description.div: Xingren Caizhai GJX6+WC -- near Tianheng Gong

names.name: Xingren Beitou Tianshu Gong Weiling Dian
興仁北斗天樞宮威靈殿

transliterations.transliteration: suè 次 king 辰 Liân 菊 Gue̍h Kiat tuànn
seoi3 ci3 gang1 san4 nin4 guk1 jyut6 gat1 daan3
suì cì gēng chén nián jú yuè jí dàn

trans.div: Sui Ci Geng Chen Year Ju Yue Jidan

suì cì gēng chén nián jú yuè jí dàn

names.name: Xingren Jiulong Taizi Dian Five Generals
興仁九龍太子殿五營

transliterations.transliteration: lei5 wai2/wai6 juk6 fung1 saam1/saam3 taai3 zi2
lǐ wèi yù fēng sān tài zi

trans.div: Li Weiyu sealed the third prince

transliterations.transliteration: tiong 𡊨 thóng 轄 Ngóo iânn ping
zung1/zung3 𡊨tung2 hat6 ng5 jing4 bing1
zhōng tán tǒng xiá wǔ yíng bīng

trans.div: Zhong𡊨 is in charge of 5 battalions.
